nasb.text: The Egyptians shall know that I am the Lord, when I stretch out My hand on Egypt and bring out the sons of Israel from their midst.”

esv.text: The Egyptians shall know that I am the Lord, when I stretch out my hand against Egypt and bring out the people of Israel from among them.”

cnv.text: 我向埃及伸手，把以色列人從他們中間領出來的時候，埃及人就必知道我是耶和華。”

ccb.text: 埃及人看见我伸手攻击他们、把以色列人带出埃及，就会知道我是耶和华。”
